description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a collapsible stock and a prominent suppressor attached to the end of the barrel. The receiver and handguard are constructed from dark metal, with a ribbed foregrip for improved handling. The pistol grip and magazine well are ergonomically shaped, and the magazine itself is detachable and box-shaped. The rifle is equipped with a carry handle that integrates iron sights, and the overall finish is a mix of matte black and dark brown tones, with some metallic highlights. The weapon's proportions and attachments suggest it is designed for urban tactical use, offering both maneuverability and reduced noise signature.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, suppressor, detachable box magazine, and integrated iron sights, finished in matte black and dark brown.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor and narrow barrel profile, with the carry handle and iron sights visible above.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the collapsible stock, ribbed foregrip, detachable magazine, and suppressor.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock and pistol grip, with the suppressor and barrel aligned away from the viewer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the magazine release and ejection port more visible.
